default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review recent content performance and define a new strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Pivot:** The current approach of repurposing random podcast transcripts is failing, yielding low engagement (e.g., 10 new subscribers) and lacking a clear purpose. The new strategy is to create highly focused content for specific audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Persona-Driven Workflow:** To enable this pivot, the team will update the existing Notion persona doc with specific pain points and goals. This will allow growthx.ai to target content effectively by simply referencing a persona ID (e.g., "target Persona 2").](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Distribution & Inspiration:** The team will analyze successful content creators to improve its LinkedIn distribution strategy and "piggyback" on their popular topics by offering a unique, potentially controversial, take.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**New Content Format:** A new format will be introduced where Guillaume and Gonto record async "hot takes" (via Loom, Slack) on these popular topics for growthx.ai to turn into posts.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Current Content Underperforms

  - [Recent posts, like those based on Noah's podcast, are not meeting quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [This stems from a lack of clear direction, as growthx.ai receives only raw transcripts without goals, target audiences, or desired story arcs.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [The result is low engagement, with subscriber growth declining from \~30 to \~10 per post.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Conclusion:** The team must choose between two paths:](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
    1.  [**Broad:** Create widely successful content to cast a wide net.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
    2.  [**Focused:** Create highly targeted, high-quality content for specific audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [The team agreed the current "in-between" approach is ineffective.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)

### Solution: A Persona-Driven Workflow

  - [The new workflow will be built around the existing Notion persona doc.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Action:** Guillaume and Julia will review and update the doc with specific pain points, frustrations, and goals for each persona.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [**Action:** growthx.ai will then use this doc to target content by referencing a persona ID (e.g., "target Persona 2"), ensuring each piece has a clear purpose.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [**Decision Point:** The team must decide whether to add a "Growth Operator" persona, which would expand the audience beyond the current focus on decision-makers (CEOs, VCs).](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

### Solution: Strategic Distribution & New Formats

  - [The team will analyze successful creators (e.g., "California," "Cannabis") to improve its LinkedIn distribution strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Action:** The team will identify popular topics from these creators and use them as a "piggyback" opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [**New Format:** Guillaume and Gonto will record async "hot takes" on these topics.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This format is designed to be time-efficient and accommodate different time zones.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [**Execution:** growthx.ai will then turn these recordings into posts, potentially highlighting diverging viewpoints for added interest.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Guillaume & Julia:**](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [Review and update the Notion persona doc by tomorrow (Nov 7).](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
      - [Decide whether to add a "Growth Operator" persona.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
      - [Analyze successful content creators to identify popular topics and distribution tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Provide guidance on updating the persona doc.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Add a placeholder for "Persona 4" to the doc.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [**Gonto:**](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Review the second blog post draft over the weekend for publication next week.](https://fathom.video/share/MSw9d8n6bCs5-yAQnFesToiyz4Wx1moy?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

action_items.description: Review persona doc; add comments; decide w/ Guillaume on Growth Operator persona
Review artifacts/config; draft desirable goals; share w/ Jenn
Analyze influencer voices/LinkedIn; share themes w/ Jenn
